{{Quote|The Ripoblus government forces consist of four Y-wings and four ''Lambda''-class shuttles.|[[Imperial briefing officer]]|<ref name="TF">[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]</ref>}}
The '''Ripoblus government''' was the ruling body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ripoblus/Legends|Ripoblus]] and its [[Ripoblus (people)|people]].<ref name="TFCCD:TOSG" /> The Ripoblus government opposed the [[Dimok government]] in the [[Sepan Civil War]] until the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Sepan campaign|intervened]]<ref name="TF" /> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==Military==
{{Quote|We are not seeking complete destruction of the attackers. We merely want to force a withdrawal. The Ripoblus leadership must also be taught that further acts of aggression will be severely punished.|[[Imperial briefing officer]]|<ref name="TF" />}}
[[File:Sepan_8.jpg|thumb|left|255px|The Galactic Empire [[Battle of Sepan 8|hoped]] to capture the leaders of [[Dimok/Legends|Dimok]] and Ripoblus near [[Sepan 8]]]]
The [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] possessed a sizeable [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], consisting of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttles]] and [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]]. For [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], they used [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]]. During the [[Sepan Civil War|war]], the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Secret Order of the Emperor]] suspected that they were armed by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]], as an [[Priest (Secret Order of the Emperor)|Order member]] noted that their facilities were not capable of producing craft they were using.

{{Company-stub}}
